observation_summaries: Image 1: A directional sign in the front view points to Tower B and Tower C. The goal 'C0.016' likely refers to Tower C (Zuid toren), which is indicated by a right arrow.
Image 2: Open glass entrance doors visible in the front view, leading into a lobby area.
Image 3: Front view shows a directory sign on the wall with a left arrow pointing to room range C0.001-C0.005. The target C0.016 is not listed on this sign.
Image 4: Front view shows a directory sign indicating C0.016 is to the left; Right view shows a closed door labeled C0.004.
Image 5: Robot is in a corridor with wood slat walls. A door labeled C0.001 is visible on the left, and a fast-forwarding corridor leads to a glass door ahead.
Image 6: A directional sign on the left wall indicates the target room range C0.016 is to the left, while an open doorway is visible ahead.
Image 7: Directory sign visible in left view indicating room C0.016 is to the left.
Image 8: Found a directory sign in the front view indicating room range C0.016 - C0.020 with a left arrow.
Image 9: A directional sign in the front view indicates the target room range C0.016 is to the left.
Image 10: The robot is in a corridor with a wooden slat wall on the right and glass doors on the left. A sign is visible further down the hall.
Image 11: The robot is in a corridor with a wooden slat wall on the right and glass windows on the left. A white door is visible at the end of the hallway.
Image 12: The robot is standing directly in front of the target door C0.016, which is visible in the right camera view.
Image 13: Robot is at the entrance of room C0.016, confirmed by the door label in the front view.
hypotheses: Goal C0.016 likely refers to Tower C (Zuid toren), requiring a right turn.
